item.title: LFOT METAR/TAF
item.description:
🟢 METAR LFOT 251630Z AUTO 11007KT 080V150 CAVOK 39/16 Q1010 TEMPO VRB15G35KT 4000 -TSRA BKN090CB
🟡 TAF AMD LFOT 251617Z 2516/2612 10010KT CAVOK PROB40 TEMPO 2516/2602 VRB15G35KT 4000 -TSRA BKN090CB BECMG 2602/2605 22010KT PROB40 TEMPO 2516/2518 2500 -TSRAGR BKN060CB
